title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions:
Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions!
